description.value:
Archetype Dedication

You have consumed the Inu Inu no Mi, Model: Wolf, bonding wolf nature to your soul and granting the Wolf-Human archetype. You gain the following benefits while your Devil Fruit is not suppressed:

  • You gain low-light vision.
  • You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Perception checks and to Survival checks to Track.
  • You gain resistance to poison damage equal to your level (minimum 5).
  • Your unarmed bite Strikes gain the trip and grapple traits and deal piercing damage.

All archetype benefits are suppressed while you are Sea-Bound.
